translationUnitItem.PreprocessingDirective: #define SWAP(a, b) do { int temp = (a); (a) = (b); (b) = temp; } while (0)

translationUnitItem.Comment: /* Macro redefinition test - use different names to avoid warnings */
/* Standard library includes - commented for compilation without libraries */
/* This line should be reported as line 100 */
/* This line should be reported as line 200 */

statement.Comment: /* Use values to prevent "unused variable" warnings */

translationUnitItem.PreprocessingDirective: #define MULTI_LINE_MACRO(x, y) do { int a = (x); int b = (y); if (a > b) { a = b; } } while (0)

unaryExpression.Comment: /* Fixed: avoid passing side-effecting expressions to macro arguments */

statement.Comment: /* Alternative: Use the macro with a separate variable */

translationUnitItem.Comment: /* Define a macro to track which variables are available */

statement.Comment: /* Verify that conditionally compiled variables exist */

translationUnitItem.Comment: /* Macro with parentheses but no parameters */
